prose.en: Maintain the attributes for each uniquely identified individual, device, or service in {param:ia-04.09_odp}.

guidance.en: For each of the entities covered in IA-2, IA-3, IA-8 , and IA-9 , it is important to maintain the attributes for each authenticated entity on an ongoing basis in a central (protected) store.

prose.en: the attributes for each uniquely identified individual, device, or service are maintained in {param:ia-04.09_odp}.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with identifier management responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing identifier management

guidelines.en: protected central storage used to maintain the attributes for each uniquely identified individual, device, or service is defined;
